programme.title: Journey to Christmas
programme.desc: A winter storm forces a fashion model to spend the week before Christmas with her chauffeur.

programme.title: A Little Women's Christmas
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of "Little Women," following the lives and loves of the March sisters.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: A Merry Christmas Wish
programme.desc: An NYC advertising executive gets involved with organizing the yearly Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: A new big box chain store threatens Jessica's Christmas tree lot when it begins to sell trees.

programme.title: My Christmas Hero
programme.desc: An army reserve doctor tracks down her family's military history with the help of a new romance.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: A Merry Christmas Wish
programme.desc: An NYC advertising executive gets involved with organizing the yearly Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: A new big box chain store threatens Jessica's Christmas tree lot when it begins to sell trees.

programme.title: My Christmas Hero
programme.desc: An army reserve doctor tracks down her family's military history with the help of a new romance.

programme.title: Designing Christmas With You
programme.desc: A decorator must work with an unexpected partner to showcase a house for an upcoming Christmas gala.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: A Merry Christmas Wish
programme.desc: An NYC advertising executive gets involved with organizing the yearly Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: A new big box chain store threatens Jessica's Christmas tree lot when it begins to sell trees.

programme.title: My Christmas Hero
programme.desc: An army reserve doctor tracks down her family's military history with the help of a new romance.

programme.title: Designing Christmas With You
programme.desc: A decorator must work with an unexpected partner to showcase a house for an upcoming Christmas gala.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: Harmony From the Heart
programme.desc: Musical therapist Violet and doctor Blake realize that sometimes love is the best medicine of all.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist who fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo.

programme.title: My Christmas Hero
programme.desc: An army reserve doctor tracks down her family's military history with the help of a new romance.

programme.title: Christmas Wreaths and Ribbons
programme.desc: A woman receives help from a neighbor when an injury puts her holiday wreath deliveries in jeopardy.

programme.title: Bringing Christmas Home
programme.desc: A professor teams with a store owner to help track down the original owner of a WWII uniform.

programme.title: A Christmas Blessing
programme.desc: A TV chef is divinely inspired to take over her late aunt's charity.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Holiday
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter and an impetuous prince cross paths and begin to fall for each other.

programme.title: Finding Faith
programme.desc: Victoria, a Christian advice columnist, begins to lose her faith after a series of life events.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Winemaker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor springs back into action when her friend is accused of murder.

programme.title: Christmas Keepsake
programme.desc: A father bonds with his daughter while tracking down the original owner of a Christmas time capsule.
